title: OREGON FAMILY TO FAMILY HEALTH INFORMATION CENTER - 211info
text: OREGON FAMILY TO FAMILY HEALTH INFORMATION CENTER OREGON FAMILY TO FAMILY HEALTH INFORMATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a call-in center for family members of children and youth with special needs and chronic health conditions (developmental and emotional disabilities, behavioral problems, and chronic physical illnesses) and professionals who serve them. The center specializes in providing information and resources related to health information, health care access, and special needs systems and supports. All calls are confidential. Families may also request to be placed on an email list to receive monthly correspondence about issues of importance to children and youth with special needs in Oregon. 707 SW Gaines Street Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Family members of individuals age 26 and younger with special physical, emotional, behavioral, or mental health needs, including those who are at risk or suspected of having a special need. The child/youth does not have to have a diagnosed condition. Does not require documentation to prove citizenship to receive services. Hours: Message line available 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (833) 990-9930 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (833) 990-9930 Español Message Line (855) 323-6744 Toll-free Message Line Español (833) 990-9930 Message Line Toll-free (855) 323-6744 Message Line Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call and leave a message. A parent partner will return the call within two to three business days. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Adolescent Health Transition Programs Autism Therapy Benefits and Services However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
